node.statement: SPECTRAL SPLIT + q^- BOUND. q_a=P(a^2)-a^2 is self-adjoint in Ker P (GT-hyp). By functional calculus (node 1.1.1) split q_a=q^+ - q^- with q^+,q^- >= 0, q^+ o q^- = 0, and ||q_a||=max(||q^+||,||q^-||). By GT-squarehole (instantiate r:=a): q_a >= -C eta ||a||^2 1. Hence 0 <= q^- <= C eta ||a||^2 1 (GT-orderunit-def: -c1<=q_a means q^-<=c1), so ||q^-|| <= C eta ||a||^2 (GT-sup-states monotonicity, 0<=q^-<=C eta||a||^2 1).
